case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. JOSE ESPINOSA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, JOSE DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, JOSE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, JOSE DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 EDDY STREET, #33 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69002474)
